name: SAM — Local User Accounts
categoryDescription: Security policy configuration, local user accounts, audit settings, and authentication configuration.
description: Local user account database — usernames, RIDs, account flags, last logon, logon count, password last set, group membership.
forensic_value: Reveals backdoor accounts. Logon count=0 on recently created enabled account is persistence indicator. Parse with samparse.pl or secretsdump.
